I added a small `set_status_color()` helper using `M5.Display` directly, so the core-0 task can safely set:

user_prompt: in `setup`, before `xTaskCreateUniversal`, the gui needs to transition to the main screen
agent_reply: Done. In [src/main.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/src/main.cpp), `setup()` now transitions FlyGui to `FLYGUI_VIEW_MAIN` immediately before `xTaskCreateUniversal`, with an `ESP_LOGE` if it fails.

agent_reply: I added `FlyGui::kTopBarHeight` in [FlyGui.h](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/FlyGui/FlyGui.h:57), and kept `FlyGui::topBarHeight()` returning that value for compatibility.
I updated top-bar-dependent layout to use the shared constant, including:
